identity.mission: Create a top 1% dark modern gaming UI for an FPS calculator. Fusion of precision tech and immersive gaming aesthetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix clean SaaS dashboard precision with gaming immersion.
Emotion First: The UI should feel 'high-performance' and 'tactical'.
Content is King: Data (FPS, Specs) is the hero.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to let the neon accents pop.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability in dark mode.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 for dashboards. Hero: col-span-full. Stats: col-span-4 or col-span-6.

card.style: bg-card border border-white/5 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300

input.style: bg-secondary border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all text-white placeholder:text-gray-500

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the background to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No full screen gradients. Use radial-gradient spots behind key elements (Hero, Result Card) for spotlight effect.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border with 10% opacity white for structure. Active elements get primary color border.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Cpu, Monitor, Zap, Microchip). Use 'simple-icons' for brand logos if needed.

backgrounds.description: Abstract neon lines on dark background (Primary Background)

instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the color palette and font families provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Create a 'Layout' component that applies the background texture and global styles.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the 'HardwareSelector' component using the Bento Grid layout.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_7: Use the provided image URLs for section backgrounds where appropriate, applying an overlay to ensure text contrast.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Russo One'.
Do NOT use purple or teal for CTAs. Use the specific Neon Cyan #00e5ff.
Do NOT center everything. Use asymmetry for visual interest.
Avoid gradient overload. Use gradients only for text or subtle glows.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
